profile.name: Vivek Kamble
profile.headline: I build practical AIML projects and full-stack apps that turn ideas into working prototypes.
profile.summary: I am a 2nd year engineering student in B.Tech AIML who enjoys building projects that mix machine learning, clean UI, and reliable APIs. I like breaking big ideas into small experiments, polishing the results, and sharing the outcome on GitHub.
profile.availability: Open to internships, collaborations, and learning opportunities

experience.summary: Exploring machine learning fundamentals, data-driven projects, and full-stack application workflows.
highlights: Building AIML mini projects and sharing learnings on GitHub.
Practicing clean UI, API integration, and reliable data flow.
Iterating on project storytelling and presentation.

experience.summary: Creating coursework and personal projects that combine AIML concepts with web delivery.
highlights: Documented project goals, results, and next steps in each repo.
Focused on readable code and clean project structure.
Added demos and snapshots to improve clarity.

projects.title: GitHub Project Gallery
projects.summary: A curated set of repositories that highlight my AIML experiments, web apps, and coursework builds.
projects.impact: Gives recruiters and collaborators a single place to explore my latest work.

projects.title: Full-Stack Practice Builds
projects.summary: Web apps that pair clean UI with backend APIs and database storage for end-to-end learning.
projects.impact: Improves my confidence in deploying full-stack systems.
